title: Add bounds validation for numeric config values
analysis: The config.py module already contains a _validate_range helper (lines 152-160) and already calls it for all the fields mentioned in the task (lines 366-372): quality_crf 0-51, yolo_sample_every_n_frames >= 1, max_wall_clock_hours >= 1, num_cpu_workers >= 1, batch_size_yolo >= 1, batch_size_whisper >= 1, gpu_device >= 0. The test file already has parametrized tests for invalid bounds (test_load_config_numeric_bounds_invalid) and valid boundaries (test_load_config_numeric_bounds_valid). However, the test coverage is incomplete: (1) Invalid tests are missing -1 cases for yolo_sample_every_n_frames, max_wall_clock_hours, num_cpu_workers, batch_size_yolo, batch_size_whisper. (2) Valid boundary tests are missing value=1 for max_wall_clock_hours, num_cpu_workers, batch_size_yolo, batch_size_whisper. The implementation is already done; only the test parametrization needs to be extended.

steps.description: Extend test_load_config_numeric_bounds_invalid parametrize list with -1 cases for yolo_sample_every_n_frames, max_wall_clock_hours, num_cpu_workers, batch_size_yolo, batch_size_whisper. These tests should pass immediately since the validation already exists in config.py.

Extend test_load_config_numeric_bounds_valid parametrize list with value=1 cases for max_wall_clock_hours, num_cpu_workers, batch_size_yolo, batch_size_whisper. These tests should pass immediately since the validation allows these values.
Verify all tests pass. No implementation changes needed in config.py — all _validate_range calls are already present (lines 366-372). This step is a confirmation pass only.

design_decisions.decision: No changes to config.py — validation already exists
design_decisions.rationale: Lines 366-372 of config.py already call _validate_range for all fields mentioned in the task: quality_crf (0-51), yolo_sample_every_n_frames (>=1), max_wall_clock_hours (>=1), num_cpu_workers (>=1), batch_size_yolo (>=1), batch_size_whisper (>=1), gpu_device (>=0). The error message format from _validate_range already matches the task's requested format.

design_decisions.decision: Only extend existing parametrized test entries
design_decisions.rationale: The test_load_config_numeric_bounds_invalid and test_load_config_numeric_bounds_valid tests already exist with the correct structure. The task asks for boundary values (0, -1, valid) for each field. Some entries are missing: -1 for the >=1 fields and valid=1 for processing fields. Adding parametrize entries is the minimal, non-disruptive change.

reuse.how: Already used for all numeric bounds. No new validation code needed.
Extend the existing @pytest.mark.parametrize lists with additional (section, field, value) tuples.
Already used by the parametrized tests to build minimal valid configs with overrides.
